## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding and project update for new team member Georgemaine](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing two core products: an AI workflow engine (Flow) and a web UI (Flow Studio) to support their agency operations and future verticals](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [The company is transitioning away from third-party tools (AirOps, Airtable) to reduce costs and confusion](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Atlas project is the current priority, aiming to create a comprehensive content management and SEO tool for clients](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Georgemaine will spend his first week with the client ops engineering team before potentially assisting with the Atlas project](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Projects

  - [Two main teams: strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Strategy team: Marcel, George, Marisol, Jason (ideation, client pitching)](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Execution team: Content creation and project management](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Client ops engineering team: Marcus, Kirkland (workflow creation, client requests)](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Platform team: Experienced engineers building core tools](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### Product Overview

1.  AI Workflow Engine (Flow)
    
      - [Core system for creating and running workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Currently combined with workflow code, plans to separate into a package](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [Potential for multiple verticals (marketing, recruiting, VA/EA services)](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

2.  Flow Studio
    
      - [Web UI for workflow visualization and execution](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [Future plans to evolve into a full IDE for workflow creation and editing](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [Inspired by tools like DBT, aiming for a balance between code and visual interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Atlas Project

  - [Comprehensive content management and SEO tool for clients](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Key features:](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [Dashboard with metrics (AI visibility, published content)](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
      - [Page and opportunity management](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
      - [Content inventory and SEO auditing](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
      - [Assignment manager for content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)

### Transition from Third-party Tools

  - [Moving away from AirOps and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Developing in-house solutions to reduce costs and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Deadline for exiting AirOps platform: June 16th](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine to complete onboarding and watch Marcel's workshop videos](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Spend next week with client ops engineering team to understand workflows and processes](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Potentially assist with Atlas project development in the following weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Prepare for San Francisco visit at the end of July for in-person team meetings](https://fathom.video/share/QsG7kQHJzVRkW-ZZMXuVBq2U9y4y_YFV?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)
